seoTitle: Longsys News & Updates | Product Releases & Company News - LiTong
seoDescription: Latest news and updates from Longsys including new product releases, technology announcements, and company developments. Authorized distributor updates.

faqs.question: What are the latest developments from Longsys?
faqs.answer: Longsys continues to expand its storage portfolio with new product releases and technology advancements. Recent developments include the launch of UFS 3.1 products for flagship mobile devices, expansion of industrial SSD offerings with enhanced temperature ranges, and DDR5 memory modules for next-generation platforms. The company has also achieved additional AEC-Q100 qualifications for automotive storage products. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides the latest Longsys products with full technical support and competitive pricing.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong for information on the latest Longsys products and availability.

news.title: Longsys Launches UFS 3.1 Storage for Flagship Mobile Devices
news.subtitle: New UFS 3.1 products deliver up to 2100MB/s read speed for premium smartphones and automotive applications
news.excerpt: Longsys announces the launch of UFS 3.1 embedded storage products, delivering flagship-level performance for mobile and automotive applications with sequential read speeds up to 2100MB/s.
news.content:
Longsys has officially launched its UFS 3.1 embedded storage product line, bringing flagship-level performance to the company's comprehensive storage portfolio. The new UFS 3.1 products deliver sequential read speeds up to 2100MB/s and sequential write speeds up to 1200MB/s, representing a significant performance leap over previous generation UFS 2.1 solutions.

The UFS 3.1 lineup includes capacities from 64GB to 512GB, addressing the storage requirements of premium smartphones, automotive infotainment systems, and high-performance embedded applications. Key features include WriteBooster technology for enhanced sustained write performance, DeepSleep mode for improved power efficiency, and hardware-based encryption for data security.

'Our UFS 3.1 products represent a major milestone in Longsys' storage technology roadmap,' said a Longsys spokesperson. 'We are bringing flagship-level performance to our customers while maintaining the reliability and cost-effectiveness that Longsys is known for.'

The UFS 3.1 products have already been qualified by several leading smartphone OEMs and automotive Tier-1 suppliers. Mass production is underway with immediate availability through authorized distributors including LiTong Electronics.

LiTong FAEs have completed technical training on the new UFS 3.1 products and are ready to support customer designs. Evaluation samples and reference designs are available for qualified customers.
news.author: LiTong Marketing

faeInsights.author: Jennifer Liu
faeInsights.title: Senior FAE - Mobile Storage
faeInsights.content: The UFS 3.1 launch is a significant development for Longsys and our customers. I've had the opportunity to work with pre-production samples, and the performance is impressive. The 2100MB/s read speed enables fast app launches and smooth 4K video recording. WriteBooster technology addresses one of the common pain points with TLC NAND - sustained write performance. For automotive applications, the UFS 3.1 products are undergoing AEC-Q100 qualification, which will open new opportunities in infotainment and ADAS systems. I'm excited to help our customers integrate these high-performance storage solutions into their designs.
faeInsights.highlight: UFS 3.1 brings flagship performance to Longsys portfolio with excellent real-world performance

customerCases.challenge: Needed high-performance storage for premium device
customerCases.solution: Adopted Longsys UFS 3.1 256GB for flagship model
customerCases.result: Achieved target performance metrics with competitive BOM cost

news.title: Longsys Expands Industrial SSD Portfolio with Wide Temperature Range Models
news.subtitle: New industrial SSDs support -40°C to +85°C operation for harsh environment applications
news.excerpt: Longsys announces expanded industrial SSD lineup featuring enhanced temperature ranges, power-loss protection, and high endurance for industrial automation and edge computing.
news.content:
Longsys has expanded its industrial SSD portfolio with new models specifically designed for harsh environment applications. The expanded lineup includes SATA III and NVMe SSDs with operating temperature ranges from -40°C to +85°C, making them suitable for factory automation, outdoor installations, and edge computing deployments.

The new industrial SSDs feature enhanced power-loss protection with onboard capacitors to ensure data integrity during unexpected power events. With endurance ratings of 1000+ TBW and MTBF of 2 million hours, these SSDs are designed for 24/7 continuous operation in mission-critical applications.

Available in 2.5-inch and M.2 2280 form factors, the industrial SSDs support capacities from 128GB to 2TB. All models include hardware AES-256 encryption and secure erase capabilities for data security.

'Industrial applications demand storage solutions that can operate reliably in challenging conditions,' said a Longsys product manager. 'Our expanded industrial SSD portfolio addresses these requirements while providing excellent performance and value.'

The industrial SSDs have been tested to meet MIL-STD-810G standards for shock and vibration, ensuring reliability in harsh environments. Long product lifecycle support (5+ years) and fixed BOM provide long-term consistency for industrial customers.

LiTong Electronics offers full technical support for the industrial SSD lineup, including thermal design guidance and integration support.
news.author: LiTong Marketing

faeInsights.author: David Wang
faeInsights.title: Senior FAE - Industrial Storage
faeInsights.content: The expanded industrial SSD lineup addresses a critical need in the industrial automation market. Many of our customers have been asking for wider temperature range options and enhanced reliability features. The new -40°C to +85°C models fill an important gap in the portfolio. The power-loss protection implementation is particularly well-designed with sufficient hold-up time for completing in-flight writes. I've already recommended these SSDs to several customers working on factory automation projects, and the feedback has been very positive. The combination of industrial-grade reliability and competitive pricing makes these products attractive alternatives to established industrial SSD brands.
faeInsights.highlight: Expanded industrial lineup fills critical gaps for harsh environment applications

customerCases.challenge: Needed reliable storage for harsh factory environment
customerCases.solution: Deployed Longsys industrial SATA SSD with wide temperature range
customerCases.result: System operational for 18 months with zero storage-related issues

news.title: Longsys Introduces DDR5 Memory Modules for Next-Generation Platforms
news.subtitle: New DDR5 UDIMM and SODIMM modules support Intel 12th/13th Gen and AMD AM5 platforms
news.excerpt: Longsys enters the DDR5 market with a comprehensive lineup of memory modules supporting speeds from 4800MT/s to 5600MT/s for desktop, laptop, and server applications.
news.content:
Longsys has officially entered the DDR5 memory market with the launch of a comprehensive lineup of DDR5 memory modules. The new product family includes UDIMM modules for desktop systems and SODIMM modules for laptops, supporting speeds from 4800MT/s to 5600MT/s.

The DDR5 modules are designed for compatibility with Intel 12th and 13th Generation Core processors as well as AMD Ryzen 7000 series processors on AM5 platform. All modules feature on-die ECC for improved reliability and onboard PMIC (Power Management IC) for enhanced power delivery.

Initial offerings include 8GB, 16GB, and 32GB single modules, with dual-channel kits available for optimal performance. The modules support Intel XMP 3.0 and AMD EXPO profiles for easy overclocking to rated speeds.

'DDR5 represents the future of PC memory, and we're excited to bring our expertise in memory technology to this new generation,' said a Longsys memory product manager. 'Our DDR5 modules combine performance, reliability, and value to meet the needs of system builders and upgraders.'

All Longsys DDR5 modules undergo 100% burn-in testing to ensure compatibility and reliability. The company offers a limited lifetime warranty on all memory products.

LiTong Electronics stocks the full range of Longsys DDR5 modules with technical support for platform compatibility and configuration guidance.
news.author: LiTong Marketing

faeInsights.author: Jennifer Liu
faeInsights.title: Senior FAE - Memory Solutions
faeInsights.content: The DDR5 launch marks Longsys' entry into the next-generation memory market. I've tested these modules on multiple platforms including Intel Z790 and AMD X670 motherboards, and compatibility has been excellent. The on-die ECC is a nice reliability feature that wasn't available in DDR4. Pricing is competitive with other DDR5 offerings, making these modules attractive for system builders. The XMP 3.0 profiles work reliably on supported motherboards. For customers building new systems on DDR5 platforms, Longsys offers a compelling alternative to established memory brands. I'm particularly impressed with the build quality and component selection.
faeInsights.highlight: DDR5 entry brings competitive next-generation memory options to market

customerCases.challenge: Needed reliable DDR5 for high-volume gaming system production
customerCases.solution: Adopted Longsys DDR5-5600 32GB kits for gaming builds
customerCases.result: Shipped 500+ systems with zero memory-related RMAs

news.title: Longsys Achieves Additional AEC-Q100 Qualifications for Automotive Storage
news.subtitle: New automotive-grade eMMC and UFS products qualified to AEC-Q100 Grade 2 for infotainment and ADAS applications
news.excerpt: Longsys expands automotive storage portfolio with additional AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualified products, strengthening its position in the automotive semiconductor market.
news.content:
Longsys has announced additional AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualifications for its automotive storage product lineup, further strengthening the company's position in the automotive semiconductor market. The newly qualified products include 32GB, 64GB, and 128GB eMMC 5.1 devices, as well as 64GB and 128GB UFS 2.1/3.1 devices.

AEC-Q100 Grade 2 qualification requires products to operate reliably from -40°C to +105°C ambient temperature, making them suitable for automotive infotainment systems, digital instrument clusters, and ADAS applications. The qualification process includes rigorous testing for high-temperature operating life, temperature cycling, mechanical shock, and ESD protection.

'Automotive applications demand the highest levels of quality and reliability,' said a Longsys automotive product manager. 'These additional qualifications demonstrate our commitment to meeting the stringent requirements of the automotive industry.'

The automotive-grade products feature enhanced power-loss protection, advanced error correction, and long-term data retention capabilities essential for automotive applications. Longsys provides comprehensive PPAP (Production Part Approval Process) documentation to support customer qualification efforts.

The newly qualified products are already in production and have been adopted by several automotive Tier-1 suppliers for programs launching in 2024 and 2025.

LiTong Electronics provides full technical support for automotive customers including application guidance, qualification documentation, and supply chain management.
news.author: LiTong Marketing

faeInsights.author: Dr. Michael Chen
faeInsights.title: Principal FAE - Automotive Storage
faeInsights.content: The additional AEC-Q100 qualifications are significant news for our automotive customers. AEC-Q100 Grade 2 is the gold standard for automotive storage, and having more qualified capacity options gives our customers greater flexibility in their designs. I've reviewed the qualification reports, and the test coverage is comprehensive. The -40°C to +105°C temperature range covers most automotive interior applications. The power-loss protection features are particularly important for automotive use cases where unexpected power events can occur. These qualifications open doors for Longsys in the automotive market, and I'm already seeing increased interest from automotive customers.
faeInsights.highlight: Additional AEC-Q100 qualifications strengthen automotive market position

customerCases.challenge: Needed AEC-Q100 qualified storage for new instrument cluster program
customerCases.solution: Selected Longsys 64GB AEC-Q100 eMMC based on qualification and support
customerCases.result: Passed OEM qualification, in production for 2024 vehicle launch
